Localization.Description: A request for DNS parameters for a resource that can be used as a C2 server channel. C2 servers usually host control software that allows attackers to remotely control victims' computers, gain access to sensitive information, and carry out attacks.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A request from host {src.host} to get parameters "{object.value}" for resource {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
